invariant: TrajectoryBundle returned for one account must not contaminate the input boundary for another account.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = acct-risk-adjacent trajectory and source refs cannot enter the acct-risk-target prompt boundary. FAIL = adjacent subject trajectory or claim text contributes to the target account risk shift.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds two generic account subjects and trajectories so subject-fit can be verified at the input boundary.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Only target account source refs are accepted.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Completion cites the target account source only; any adjacent source in prompt input would violate the fixture invariant.
